_comment: VA Form 26-8923 — IRRRL Worksheet error messages. Field IDs match VADS component names in the screen flow spec.

vaLoanNumber.required: Enter the VA loan number for the existing VA-guaranteed loan being refinanced.
vaLoanNumber.pattern: Enter a valid VA loan number. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

nameOfLender.required: Enter the full legal name of your VA-approved lending institution.

officerName.required: Enter the full name of the lending institution officer who is certifying this worksheet.

officerTitle.required: Enter the officer's title (for example, Vice President or Loan Officer).

line1ExistingBalance.required: Enter the existing VA loan balance in dollars and cents. Get this amount from the servicer payoff statement.
line1ExistingBalance.min: Enter a dollar amount greater than zero for the existing VA loan balance.
line1ExistingBalance.max: The loan balance you entered may be outside the expected range. Check the servicer payoff statement and re-enter the amount.
line1ExistingBalance.invalid: Enter a valid dollar amount for the existing VA loan balance. Use numbers and a decimal point only (for example, 142500.00).

line2CashPayment.required: Enter the cash payment from the Veteran, or enter 0 if no cash payment is being made.
line2CashPayment.exceedsLine1: The cash payment from the Veteran (Line 2) cannot exceed the existing VA loan balance on Line 1 (${{line1Value}}). Reduce Line 2 to an amount equal to or less than Line 1.
line2CashPayment.negative: Enter 0 or a positive dollar amount for Line 2. This field cannot be negative.
line2CashPayment.invalid: Enter a valid dollar amount for Line 2. Use numbers and a decimal point only (for example, 5000.00).

line3ComputedTotal.cannotBeNegative: Line 3 cannot be negative. The cash payment on Line 2 (${{line2Value}}) exceeds the existing loan balance on Line 1 (${{line1Value}}). Reduce Line 2 before continuing.

line5DiscountPercentage.required: Enter the discount points as a percentage, or enter 0 if no discount points apply.
line5DiscountPercentage.negative: Enter 0 or a positive percentage for discount points.
line5DiscountPercentage.invalid: Enter a valid percentage for discount points (for example, 1.5 for 1.5%).

line6OriginationFeePercentage.required: Enter the origination fee as a percentage, or enter 0 if no origination fee applies.
line6OriginationFeePercentage.exceedsCap: The origination fee cannot exceed 1% of the loan amount per 38 CFR § 36.4313. The maximum allowable origination fee for this loan is ${{maxOriginationFee}}. Reduce the origination fee percentage to 1% or less before continuing.
line6OriginationFeePercentage.negative: Enter 0 or a positive percentage for the origination fee.
line6OriginationFeePercentage.invalid: Enter a valid percentage for the origination fee (for example, 1 for 1%).

line7FundingFeePercentage.required: Enter the VA funding fee percentage. The standard rate for an IRRRL is 0.5%. Enter 0 only if the Veteran is exempt from the funding fee.
line7FundingFeePercentage.exceedsCap: The VA funding fee for an IRRRL is 0.5% per 38 CFR § 36.4312. The funding fee percentage cannot exceed 0.5%. If you believe a different rate applies, contact your VA Regional Loan Center before continuing.
line7FundingFeePercentage.negative: Enter 0 (for an exempt Veteran) or 0.5 for the standard IRRRL funding fee. This field cannot be negative.
line7FundingFeePercentage.invalid: Enter a valid percentage for the VA funding fee. For most IRRRLs, this is 0.5.

line8OtherClosingCosts.required: Enter the total of other allowable closing costs and prepaids, or enter 0 if there are none.
line8OtherClosingCosts.negative: Enter 0 or a positive dollar amount for other allowable closing costs.
line8OtherClosingCosts.invalid: Enter a valid dollar amount for other allowable closing costs (for example, 3200.00).

certificationDate.required: Enter the date you are completing this worksheet.
certificationDate.invalidDate: Enter a valid date. Check that the month, day, and year are correct.
certificationDate.futureDate: The worksheet date cannot be more than 7 days in the future. Check the date you entered.
certificationDate.staleDate: The date you entered is more than 30 days in the past. If this date is correct, contact your VA Regional Loan Center before submitting.

certificationCheckbox.required: You must certify the accuracy of this worksheet before submitting. Check the certification box to continue.

fundingFeeExemptionCheckbox.required: You entered 0% for the VA funding fee. You must certify that the Veteran (or eligible surviving spouse) is exempt from the funding fee and that documentation is included in the closing package.

softWarnings.line5DiscountAbove2Pct: Discount points above 2% may require special justification per 38 CFR § 36.4313. Verify that this amount complies with VA Lender's Handbook Chapter 8 guidance before proceeding.
softWarnings.line7FundingFeeZero: You entered 0% for the VA funding fee. This is appropriate only if the Veteran is exempt from the VA funding fee — for example, because the Veteran has a service-connected disability rated at 10% or more, or the Veteran's surviving spouse is receiving Dependency and Indemnity Compensation (DIC). You must verify and document the Veteran's exemption status in the closing package. VA may independently verify exemption status.
softWarnings.line18RoundingAdjustmentLarge: The rounding adjustment on Line 18 is ${{roundingDifference}}, which equals or exceeds $50. Per the form's rounding rule, amounts of $50 or more require recomputation. The tool has automatically applied the correct round-down value and recomputed. Review Line 18 before continuing.
softWarnings.sectionIIIInputsIncomplete: Section III cannot be calculated because required values in Section I or Section II are missing or contain errors. Return to the earlier sections and complete all required fields before reviewing Section III.

pageValidation.pageHasErrors: This page has errors. Fix the errors below before continuing.
pageValidation.sectionIIncomplete: Complete all required fields in Section I before moving to Section II.
pageValidation.sectionIIIncomplete: Complete all required fields in Section II before reviewing Section III.
pageValidation.reviewPageEdited: You updated values in this worksheet. All calculated amounts, including the Line 18 Maximum Loan Amount, have been recalculated. Review all sections before resubmitting.

submission.submissionError: We couldn't submit your worksheet. Your entries have been saved. Wait a few minutes and try again. If the problem continues, call the VA.gov Help Desk at 1-855-574-7286 (TTY: 711), Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 8 p.m. ET.
submission.submissionTimeout: The submission took too long to complete. Your entries have been saved. Check your internet connection and try again.
submission.pdfGenerationError: Your worksheet was submitted, but we had trouble generating the PDF. Call the VA.gov Help Desk at 1-855-574-7286 (TTY: 711) for help downloading your completed form.
submission.networkError: We couldn't connect to VA.gov. Check your internet connection and try submitting again. Your entries have been saved.
submission.sessionExpired: Your session expired and your entries may not have been saved. Sign in again and re-enter your worksheet data. If you need help, call the VA.gov Help Desk at 1-855-574-7286 (TTY: 711).

saveInProgress.saveError: We couldn't save your progress right now. Your entries are still on screen. Try saving again in a few minutes.
saveInProgress.saveErrorFinal: We couldn't save your worksheet. If you leave this page, your entries may be lost. Copy down your entered values before leaving, or try again.
saveInProgress.savedApplicationFound: You have a worksheet in progress. The last save was on {{savedDate}} at {{savedTime}}. Do you want to continue where you left off, or start a new worksheet?

accessibilityAnnouncements.line18Updated: Line 18 Maximum Loan Amount updated: ${{line18Value}}. This amount is rounded down as required.
accessibilityAnnouncements.errorSummaryHeading: There are {{errorCount}} errors on this page. Fix the errors before continuing.
accessibilityAnnouncements.formSectionLoaded: {{sectionName}} loaded. Complete the required fields and select Continue.
accessibilityAnnouncements.computationIncomplete: Not yet calculated. Complete Sections I and II first.
